name: gpt-taste
tagline: Prompt-engineering rules for GSAP-animated, AIDA-structured landing pages with forced layout randomization and strict hero/bento.
verdict: Very concrete visual and motion rules with a required pre-flight design_plan step, and no network/exec/secret risks. Gaps: assumes GSAP and phosphor-icons are installed without ever declaring them, gives no failure-path guidance, and the description never states when to invoke it.

highlights.summary: Description (line 3) lists features exhaustively but never states 'use when X' — no explicit trigger phrasing.
No exclusions or 'not for' guidance found anywhere in the skill.
No mention anywhere of what to do if GSAP, fonts, or image URLs fail to load.
